message:
feat: new doctor checks + agent bead creation on rig add/adopt

New doctor checks:
- idle-timeout-config: Verify dolt.idle-timeout: "0" for all rigs
- rig-config-sync: Verify registered rigs have config.json, Dolt DB, identity beads
- stale-dolt-port: Detect port mismatches in metadata.json
- stale-runtime-files: Detect stale PID files for removed rigs

Also:
- Create witness/refinery agent beads during gt rig add and adopt
- Fall back to rigs.json for prefix lookup in getRigOperationalState
- Remove orphaned dolt_port_file_check (replaced by stale-dolt-port)
- Remove orphaned port_sync_test.go (SyncPortFiles was already removed)
- Fix build: replace DoltPortFileCheck with StaleDoltPortCheck in upgrade.go

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2600
Author: ChicK00o (Rohit Bhosle)

Co-authored-by: Rohit Bhosle <mail@rohitbhosle.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -178,11 +178,13 @@ func runDoctor(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {

-	d.Register(doctor.NewRigsJSONCheck())

 	d.Register(doctor.NewRigNameMismatchCheck())
+	d.Register(doctor.NewRigConfigSyncCheck()) // Check all registered rigs have config.json
+	d.Register(doctor.NewStaleDoltPortCheck()) // Check for stale Dolt port files
 	d.Register(doctor.NewPrefixMismatchCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewDatabasePrefixCheck())
+	d.Register(doctor.NewIdleTimeoutCheck()) // Verify dolt.idle-timeout: "0" for all rigs
 	d.Register(doctor.NewRoutesCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewRigRoutesJSONLCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewRoutingModeCheck())

+	d.Register(doctor.NewStaleRuntimeFilesCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewBranchCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewCloneDivergenceCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewDefaultBranchAllRigsCheck())
@@ -254,7 +257,6 @@ func runDoctor(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
 	d.Register(doctor.NewHooksSyncCheck())
 
 	// Dolt data health checks (binary + server reachability moved to top as prerequisites)
-	d.Register(doctor.NewDoltPortFileCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewDoltMetadataCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewDoltOrphanedDatabaseCheck())

-	d.Register(doctor.NewDoltPortFileCheck())
